For Reliability Managers & Maintenance Superintendents

Prove it works. Then scale it yourself.

You know the monitoring gap exists. You've seen the failures nobody predicted. SAM4 gives you the detection data to prove the case internally and the tools to build it for the board.

Calculate Your ROI Get the Engineering Proof Pack

You can't fix what you can't see. And you can't fund what you can't prove.

30-40% of your rotating assets sit outside your monitoring programme. Submerged pumps, enclosed fans, remote compressors. You know they fail. You know the cost. But without continuous data, you can't build the case for investment. Every unplanned failure weakens your credibility. Every prevented failure strengthens it.

Detection data you can use. Tools you can forward.

Detection Proof

SAM4 detects bearing wear, cavitation, misalignment, and electrical faults 4-8 weeks before failure. 0.32% false positive rate. Every alert reviewed by a Samotics diagnostics engineer.

ROI Calculator

Input your asset count, failure frequency, and downtime cost. Get a credible business case you can present to your Plant Director. Based on validated customer data, not assumptions.

Champion Enablement Kit

Internal presentation deck, pre-built business case, competitive positioning, security FAQ. Everything you need to sell condition monitoring to your buying committee.

Named customers. Quantified outcomes.

Yorkshire Water

35 pollution incidents prevented. 70,000 manual inspections replaced. 10 million pound sole-supplier contract.

ArcelorMittal

Bearing fault detected 5 months before failure. 50,000 euros plus avoided per detection. Fleet expanded across European sites.

Schiphol Airport

100% detection accuracy (9 of 9 failures). HVAC motor bearing degradation caught months early.

From pilot to fleet. Here's how it works.

1

Validate

Start with 1-10 critical assets via SAM4-X. Predefined success criteria. OpEx funded. Below tender threshold.

2

Prove

First insights in 30 days. Actionable detection in 30-90 days. Quantifiable ROI at 90 days.

3

Equip

Use the Champion Enablement Kit to present findings to your Plant Director and buying committee.

4

Scale

Documented deployment playbook for fleet expansion. Multi-site rollout with enterprise governance.

What ESA detects. And where it doesn't.

ESA monitors through the motor's electrical signature. It detects electrical faults (stator winding, rotor bar, eccentricity), process faults (cavitation, blockage), and late-stage mechanical degradation. It works on any AC motor connected to the MCC. Minimum 0.75 kW. Baseline: 2-4 weeks. VFD-driven motors require additional signal conditioning. ESA does not replace vibration monitoring on accessible, high-criticality assets where vibration has a direct measurement path. It extends monitoring to everything vibration cannot reach.

See full detection boundaries →
We started with 12 pumps on a pilot. After six months and three confirmed fault detections, we expanded to 400 assets across four sites. The accuracy convinced our maintenance team.
Senior Reliability Engineer, Industrial Customer

Start with one asset. Prove it on ten.

SAM4-X is a paid validation programme. 1-10 critical assets. Predefined success criteria. The goal: portable proof you can use to build the enterprise case.

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
